name: wd-k01
description: OctoBus package for WD K01 login, IP block, IP unblock, and logout workflows.

WD_K01.WD_K01/BlockIP.name: block-ip
WD_K01.WD_K01/BlockIP.description: Log in to WD K01, block one IPv4 address, and log out.

WD_K01.WD_K01/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
WD_K01.WD_K01/UnblockIP.description: Log in to WD K01, unblock one IPv4 address, and log out.
